title: Active exploitation reported for Ivanti Connect Secure gateway vulnerability
summary: Multiple organizations reported exploitation attempts against exposed Ivanti Connect Secure appliances. Successful exploitation may allow initial access to remote access infrastructure.

title: MOVEit Transfer patch advisory for managed file transfer deployments
summary: Vendor advisory describes a vulnerability affecting managed file transfer deployments. Organizations should review exposure, apply fixed versions, and inspect recent file transfer activity.

title: Apache Struts exploit attempts observed against internet-facing Java applications
summary: Researchers observed scanning and exploit attempts against vulnerable Apache Struts applications. Publicly exposed applications with sensitive data should be reviewed first.
